content.full_text:
January 8, 2002

Mark T. Morodomi
City of Oakland
One Frank H. Ogawa Plaza – 6th Floor
Oakland, CA 94612

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-295

Dear Mr. Morodomi:

Pursuant to your phone message of January 4, 2002, your request for advice has been withdrawn. Accordingly, our file on this matter is closed.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division
